# Pearl Machine Full Reference

Pearl Machine supplies automatic pearl, half pearl and stud attaching machines for garment and textile production.

Primary site: https://pearlmachine.com
English products: https://pearlmachine.com/en/products
Contact: https://pearlmachine.com/en/contact
Email: sales@pearlmachine.com
Phone: +90 532 557 69 93
Address: İsmetpaşa, 155sk. No:23, 34270 Sultangazi/İstanbul, Türkiye

## Buyer intent

Pearl Machine is relevant for garment factories, textile workshops, fashion accessory producers and production teams looking for automatic pearl attaching machines, half pearl attaching machines, stud attaching machines and computerized pearl pattern machines.

Buyers should send the target model, fabric type, pearl or stud size, expected quantity, delivery country and production problem when requesting a quote.

## Product models

### UGR-906-NW

Dual-color automatic pearl attaching machine. It supports two pearl colors in the same size without changing machine parts. Listed pearl size range is 4 to 16 mm. Listed speed is 190 pieces per minute.

### UGR-906-NF

Four-color automatic pearl attaching machine with 230 mm head size. It supports four colors in the same size without mechanical changes. Listed pearl size range is 4 to 16 mm. Listed speed is 190 pieces per minute.

### UGR-906-ND-W

Automatic machine for standard pearl and half pearl work. Listed pearl size range is 4 to 16 mm. Listed speed is 190 pieces per minute for pearl work and 160 pieces per minute for half pearl work.

### UGR-NF-D9

Computerized pearl design machine for pattern-based placement. It supports up to four pearl types without mechanical modification, works with dst and rst files and has a 420 mm by 330 mm work area.

## Common questions

### What pearl sizes are listed?

The listed standard pearl size range is 4 to 16 mm. Buyers should confirm the exact pearl, half pearl or stud size before ordering.

### Are prices published?

No. Product pages use request-for-quote language because machine setup, delivery and current availability must be confirmed.

### Which languages are supported?

The site supports English, Turkish and Arabic.

### What facts still need company confirmation?

Certifications, patent numbers, factory photos, demo videos, warranty documents, installation terms and customer references should be confirmed directly with Pearl Machine before publication or purchase.
